headline: Roommate's 'I'll Clean The Dishes' Has Been Replaced By 'I'll Buy Paper Plates' After 47 Days
summary: The environmental guilt is less than the dish guilt. Priorities.
fullBody: Chad Dishavoider has announced a new solution to his 47-day dish standoff: paper plates. 'It's about efficiency,' Chad explained. His roommate, Jenna, has started a 'reusable plate stash' hidden in her room. Chad has now graduated to 'eating over the sink' to avoid any plate usage whatsoever. The paper plate pile is now 6 feet high. Jenna has started composting. Chad has started 'ordering delivery only.'
